defs: The act of proscribing; a dooming to death or exile; outlawry; specifically, among the ancient Romans, the public offer of a reward for the head of a political enemy; as, under the triumvirate, many of the best Roman citizens fell by proscription.
quotes: Every victory by either party had been followed by a sanguinary proscription.

defs: The state of being proscribed; denunciation; interdiction; prohibition.
